empty.noSpacesHelper: Create your first space to get started

empty.headline: Ready when you are
empty.subtext: Choose a next step, or pick a prompt to get moving fast.
examples: Turn our recent updates into a confident summary.
If you were me, what would you do to get better?
Teach me about [subject] using an interactive, proven method.

home.memoryOnHelper: We only store what you approve.
home.memoryClarityBody: ZAKI only saves what helps you. Review and manage memories anytime.
ramadanExamples: Give me suggestions for today's Ramadan meals from my region that are easy to make.
Give me tips and tricks to survive fasting.
Draft Ramadan greetings to send to my family and friends.

quickStart.title: Give me 5 actionable ideas for [problem].
quickStart.body: Get practical, high-impact suggestions in seconds.

quickStart.title: Create a 7-day plan for [goal].
quickStart.body: Simple daily steps, prioritized and realistic.

quickStart.title: Draft a professional email for [topic + tone].
quickStart.body: Clear, concise, and ready to send.

missionSlides.title: Local-first intelligence
missionSlides.body: Most AI is trained on global data that misses local culture. We build ZAKI to feel native, not generic — shaped by how communities think, speak, and decide.

missionSlides.title: Built on a powerful base model
missionSlides.body: ZAKI starts with strong reasoning, then adapts to local language, context, and norms — so answers sound right, not translated.

missionSlides.title: Improves with you
missionSlides.body: With every interaction, ZAKI learns to align more closely with your culture, heritage, and way of thinking — becoming more personal over time.

news.title: ZAKI Weekly
news.body: Product updates, memory tips, and launch progress.

news.title: Behind the memory engine
news.body: A short note on how we keep context private and useful.

memoryCards.title: Review saved memories
memoryCards.body: Edit or delete anything ZAKI keeps.

memoryCards.title: You stay in control
memoryCards.body: ZAKI asks for confirmation in manual mode.

capabilities: Remembers what you shared earlier in the conversation
Lets you correct or refine context over time
limitations: May sometimes miss nuance without enough context
Knowledge may be limited for very recent events

share.title: Share Conversation
share.subtitle: Create a shareable link
share.errorPasswordLength: Password must be at least 4 characters
share.successPublic: Anyone with this link can view the conversation
share.expires: This link will expire in 10 days.

input.disclaimer: Zaki can make mistakes. Consider checking important information.
